details.test: Task 1: Rent cheapest 1-day audio system under $150 with 4+ stars
Task 2: Book mid-priced birthday package for 25 guests
Task 3: Rent two equipment items with specific quantities and 2-day duration
Task 4: Compare two equipment items and add higher-brightness one to cart
Task 5: Book earliest available conference room with free cancellation
Task 6: Create wishlist with three constrained equipment items

Task 9: Send availability inquiry to a venue for Dec 31, 2026 9:00 PM
